## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix/`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat/`)
- [ ] Data addition or correction (`data/`)
- [ ] Translation (`i18n/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have opened an issue and it was approved before this PR
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes without errors
- [ ] No use of `any` in TypeScript
- [ ] Components follow the design system (dark mode, Tailwind, no CSS modules)
- [ ] Data changes include a cited source in this description
- [ ] This PR targets `develop`, not `main`
